source_rationale: CD69 is an early T/NK cell activation marker, indicating activated lymphocytes
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK cells and NKT cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule characteristic of NK and cytotoxic T cells
IL7R (CD127) marks memory T cells and innate lymphoid cells
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T and NK cells
CD7 is a pan-T/NK cell marker supporting lymphoid identity
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein marking lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural lens protein
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development
Gamma-crystallin S is expressed in lens fiber cells
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in lens progenitor maintenance
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells for water transport
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells and antigen-presenting cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell marker
CD79A is a B cell receptor signaling component and B cell lineage marker
MHC class II expression is characteristic of B cells and antigen-presenting cells
Immunoglobulin J chain indicates immunoglobulin-producing B lineage cells
LINC00926 is a B cell-specific long non-coding RNA
IRF8 is a transcription factor important for B cell and dendritic cell development
Keratin 3 is a cornea-specific epithelial keratin marking corneal epithelial cells
Keratin 12 is specifically expressed in corneal epithelium
Claudin 4 is a tight junction protein in differentiated epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor
MAL is a lipid raft protein expressed in differentiated epithelial cells
Claudin 7 is an epithelial tight junction marker
LY6D marks stratified squamous epithelial cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed by fibroblasts/stromal cells
Fibulin-1 is an extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
Matrix metalloproteinase 2 is characteristic of stromal fibroblasts
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in mesenchymal/fibroblast populations
SFRP4 is a Wnt pathway modulator expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Matrix Gla protein is produced by mesenchymal cells
Complement C1r is produced by fibroblasts in connective tissue
Transgelin marks activated fibroblasts/myofibroblasts
Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein marking specific retinal ganglion/amacrine cell subtypes

Calbindin marks horizontal cells and specific amacrine cell subtypes in the retina
NDRG4 is expressed in neurons including retinal ganglion cells

p21 (CDKN1A) marks cell cycle-arrested or quiescent cells

SPP1 (osteopontin) marks activated/inflammatory macrophages

S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a marker of myeloid cells, especially monocytes/neutrophils
